title: Data Analyst Data Warehouse Analytics and BI

summary.lv: Datu analītiķa loma ar uzsvaru uz datu noliktavas analītiku un biznesa inteliģenci uzņēmumā OWL Services, atbalstot atskaišu un analītikas vajadzības visā uzņēmumā.
summary.en: Data analyst role focused on data-warehouse analytics and business intelligence at OWL Services, a US field-service provider, supporting reporting and analytics across the business.
